news.headline: Constellation Brands' E. Yuri Hermida leaves, Mallika Monteiro named interim Chief Growth & Strategy Officer.
news.summary: Mallika Monteiro has been appointed as the interim Chief Growth & Strategy Officer, in addition to her role as the Executive Vice President and Managing Director of Beer Brands. This change reflects her expanded responsibilities within the company.

news.headline: Coeur Mining reports 3.6M oz of gold, 270.5M oz of silver for 2024 reserves, reflecting 22% increase in gold reserves at Kensington.
news.summary: In Chicago, Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE: CDE) revealed its 2024 year-end mineral reserves and resources. The company reported 3.6 million ounces of gold and 270.5 million ounces of silver in proven and probable mineral reserves. This represents a 22% rise in gold reserves at Kensington compared to the previous year. The numbers also include silver and gold ounces acquired recently as part of their exploration program at the Palmarejo operation.

news.headline: Ares Management increases Tempus debt facilities to $560 million, with $300 million in incremental financing for Ambry Genetics.
news.summary: In New York, Ares Management Corporation (NYSE: ARES), a prominent global alternative investment manager, revealed that Ares Credit funds have assumed the role of administrative agent for $300 million in additional debt financing for Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM). Tempus is a technology company at the forefront of utilizing AI to enhance precision medicine and patient care. This funding aims to facilitate Tempus’ recent purchase of Ambry Genetics, following its announcement.

news.headline: Comtech appoints David B. Kagan as an independent director to its Board of Directors. He brings over 35 years of experience in satellite communications.
news.summary: Chandler, Arizona--On February 18, 2025, Comtech Telecommunications Corp. (NASDAQ: CMTL) appointed David B. Kagan as an independent director to its Board. Kagan brings over 35 years of experience in leading satellite communications companies. The appointment is effective from February 13, 2025. Comtech is a global communications technology leader.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile will provide a quarterly business update on March 3, 2025. Earnings release on March 3 at 5:00 p.m., followed by a conference call on March 4 at 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time). $ASTS.
news.summary: MIDLAND, Texas—AST SpaceMobile, Inc. ("AST SpaceMobile") will be releasing its earnings on Monday, March 3rd at 5:00 p.m. They are the creators of a unique space-based cellular broadband network that can be used with regular smartphones, catering to commercial and government needs. A quarterly business update conference call is scheduled for Tuesday, March 4th at 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time). AST SpaceMobile will address queries during the call. The company is listed as NASDAQ: ASTS.

news.headline: Know Labs announces 1 for 40 reverse stock split effective Feb 19, 2025, moving from NYSE American to OTC Pink Markets.
news.summary: In Seattle, Know Labs, Inc. (formerly known as KNW on NYSE American, now trading as KNWN on OTC Pink Markets) revealed a 1 for 40 reverse stock split for its common stock. This move, announced on February 18, 2025, will consolidate authorized and outstanding shares. The reverse split will take effect on February 19, 2025. This strategic decision aims to enhance the company's common stock value.

news.headline: OppFi (NYSE: OPFI) to report Q4 and FY 2024 results on March 5, 2025. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Announced today, OppFi Inc. (NYSE: OPFI) will release its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 before market opening on Wednesday, March 5, 2025. Following this, a conference call will be held on the same day at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time by management to review the financial performance and future prospects of OppFi. This move aims to provide insights about the tech-driven finance platform connecting community banks to offer credit options to average Americans.

news.headline: Steve Worland, Ph.D., appointed as CEO of Atomwise, known for ML/AI in drug discovery. Over three decades of experience.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Atomwise, a company specializing in utilizing machine learning and artificial intelligence for enhancing small molecule drug discovery, revealed the selection of Steve Worland, Ph.D., as the new Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors. With over thirty years of expertise in leadership and research and development within various biotech and pharma firms, Dr. Worland will collaborate closely with Atomwise's current management team and Board of Directors.

news.headline: NLRB withdraws unfair labor practices claim against Neogen® (NASDAQ: NEOG) in Lansing, Mich. on Feb.18, 2025.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Lansing, Michigan, Neogen® Corporation, a key player in food safety solutions and listed on NASDAQ as NEOG, reported that the National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) has retracted its accusation of unfair labor practices against the company. The withdrawal of the claim came after...

news.headline: Faraday Future plans to expand AI recruitment in 2025, hiring for key positions in large-model development and algorithm training. Ticker symbol to change to "FFAI."
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIE) has initiated recruitment for crucial roles to bolster its AI projects. The company aims to enhance its AI research and development endeavors by hiring specialized AI professionals, particularly those experienced in large-model development and algorithm training. Concurrently, Faraday Future intends to rebrand its Nasdaq ticker symbol to "FFAI." This move underscores the company's commitment to expanding its AI capabilities.

news.headline: Ranger Energy Services, Inc. will report Q4 & full year 2024 results on March 3, 2025; earnings call on March 4, 2025, at 10:00 AM ET.
news.summary: Ranger Energy Services, Inc. will release its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 after the market closes on Monday, March 3, 2025. The company's management will conduct an earnings conference call on Tuesday, March 4, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time (9:00 a.m. Central time). To participate, individuals can dial 1-833-255-2829 or 1-412-902-6710.

news.headline: Sotera Health (NASDAQ: SHC) to release Q4 2024 earnings on Feb 27, 2025. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: Sotera Health Company, a prominent global provider of crucial sterilization solutions and healthcare advisory services, disclosed their intentions to unveil the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The results are scheduled for release before the market commences on February 27, 2025. Moreover, a conference call will be hosted by management at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to deliberate on the Company’s operational achievements and financial performance. Sotera Health Company trades on Nasdaq under the symbol SHC.

news.headline: Unisys' 4Q and Full-Year 2024 results show exceeding profitability guidance, meeting revenue target. Annual gross profit margin up by 180 bps YoY.
news.summary: The company has surpassed its profitability expectations and achieved its revenue goals, demonstrating notable improvements in operating and free cash flow compared to the previous year. The full-year gross profit margin stands at 29.2%, marking a substantial increase of 180 basis points year over year. When excluding License and Support (Ex-L&S), the gross profit margin is at 17.6%.

news.headline: EQT reports Q4 and full year 2024 results with sales volume of 605 Bcfe and provides 2025 guidance.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on February 18, 2025, EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) revealed its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, along with financial and operational projections for 2025. Noteworthy highlights include a sales volume of 605 billion cubic feet equivalent (Bcfe) during the fourth quarter.

news.summary: In Franklin, Tennessee on February 18, 2025, Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated (NYSE: CHCT) shared its financial outcomes for the quarter ending on December 31, 2024. The Company disclosed a net income of around $1.8 million during this period.

Toll Brothers reports FY 2025 Q1 results, the nation's leading luxury home builder, ended Jan 31.
news.summary: Fort Washington, Pennsylvania - On February 18, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc. disclosed its first quarter results for the period ending January 31, 2025. Toll Brothers, Inc., a prominent luxury home builder in the United States, shared its financial performance data publicly. The company's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol TOL.

news.headline: Starbox registers trademarks in Philippines, incl. "Starbox," "StarboxAI," and "StarboxChat," part of regional growth strategy.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on February 18, 2025, Starbox Group Holdings Ltd. (Nasdaq: STBX) revealed the registration of its trademarks "Starbox," "StarboxAI," and "StarboxChat" in the Philippines. The company, known for cash rebates, advertising, and payment solutions, aims to evolve into an artificial intelligence solutions provider in Southeast Asia. This move signifies a significant advancement in Starbox's regional expansion plan, demonstrating its dedication to establishing a solid foothold in Southeast Asia. The Philippines, with its growing population, serves as a pivotal market in the company's growth strategy, in alignment with its overarching expansion objectives.

news.headline: Athene Holding Ltd. declares Q1 2025 Preferred Stock dividends, payable on March 31 to holders, with record date of March 15.
news.summary: In West Des Moines, Iowa, on February 18, 2025, Athene Holding Ltd. revealed the preferred stock dividends for their non-cumulative preferred stock. These dividends will be paid on March 31, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 15, 2025. The preferred stock dividends apply to depositary shares, where each represents a 1/1,000th interest in a share of preferred stock. This announcement highlights Athene's commitment to its shareholders and signifies the company's financial health.

news.headline: Teva to discuss Duvakitug study results at conference call on Feb 24, 2025, from the 20th ECCO. Key leaders to present.
news.summary: Israeli pharmaceutical company Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. will be holding a conference call and live webcast on February 24, 2025, at 8 am E.T. During the call, Eric Hughes, MD, PhD, Executive Vice President of Global R&D and Chief Medical Officer, along with external IBD key opinion leaders, will review the latest data on duvakitug (anti-TL1A) following successful Phase 2b results presentation at the 20th Annual Congress of the European Crohn's and Colitis Organization (ECCO). The company's stocks are listed on NYSE and TASE under the ticker symbol TEVA.

news.headline: Aptose reveals reverse share split at ratio of 1:5.
Zefiro Methane Corp. CEO discusses company's role in plugging orphaned oil and gas wells on Bloomberg.
news.summary: Dr. Talal Debs from Zefiro discussed the company's efforts in addressing the orphaned oil and gas well issue in the U.S. Zefiro has emerged as the largest plugger of these sites in North America. Their work has created substantial opportunities for various market participants to remediate this significant public health problem.

news.headline: Bumble, Inc. (NASDAQ:BMBL) Q4 Report: Revenue $261.6M, Down from $273.64M last year. Total Paying Users fall by 57,000. App Revenue dips by 3.8% to $212.4M.
news.summary: Dating app company Bumble, Inc. (NASDAQ:BMBL) released its Q4 results, surpassing analyst expectations with a revenue of $261.6 million, a drop from $273.64 million in the same period last year. Total Paying Users decreased by 57,000 from the previous quarter. Bumble App Revenue also saw a decline of 3.8% to $212.4 million, compared to $220.7 million, with an adverse impact of $1.7 million from currency movements.

news.headline: Trump: I think I have the power to end this war in Ukraine.
Pedro Mendieta appointed President of Legrand's Data, Power, and Control Division for North and Central America.
news.summary: In West Hartford, Connecticut on February 18, 2025, Legrand®, a renowned company in electrical and digital building infrastructures, has appointed Pedro Mendieta as the President of the Data, Power, and Control (DPC) Division. This appointment comes within the framework of Legrand's operations in North and Central America.

news.headline: The Children's Place appoints Rhys Summerton to Board of Directors; he'll serve until 2025 annual meeting.
news.summary: Secaucus, New Jersey, on February 18, 2025 - The Children’s Place, Inc. (Nasdaq: PLCE), the leading pure-play children’s specialty retailer in North America with a range of brands across various channels, has announced the appointment of Rhys Summerton to its Board of Directors and as a member of the Audit Committee. Mr. Summerton will serve until the Company's 2025 annual stockholders meeting. Ms. Summerton, an independent director, meets the criteria as an “audit committee financial expert” per SEC and Nasdaq regulations.

news.headline: Sandals Resorts in Jamaica offering up to $1,250 off vacations with perks till March 9, 2025.
news.summary: Travelers can now book discounted vacations with savings of up to $1,250, and enjoy additional benefits such as a complimentary night stay and a catamaran experience for two. Available for booking until March 9, this offer allows visitors to explore the wonders of Sandals Resorts in Montego Bay, Jamaica.

news.headline: GCL SI earns EcoVadis Silver Medal, top 15% for ESG. stood out from 150,000+ companies globally.
news.summary: In Munich on February 18, 2025, GCL System Integration (GCL SI) announced that they successfully obtained the EcoVadis Group-level Silver Medal certification on February 17, 2025. This achievement is particularly notable as GCL SI was competing against more than 150,000 companies worldwide.

news.headline: Solo Brands, Inc. appoints John Larson as Interim CEO, replacing Chris Metz who stepped down. (Word Count: 16)
news.summary: In Grapevine, Texas, Solo Brands, Inc. (NYSE: DTC) has named John Larson, a Board member, as the Interim President and CEO of the company. This change comes as previous CEO Chris Metz steps down from his roles, including President, CEO, and Board member. Mr. Metz will assist in the transition process. John Larson assumes his new position immediately following this announcement.

news.headline: Supernus reports Phase 2b results for SPN-820 in adults with TRD, showing no significant improvement on primary endpoint MADRS score.
news.summary: Supernus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. announced in Feb. 18, 2025, that their Phase 2b study of SPN-820 for adults with treatment-resistant depression did not show a statistically significant improvement in the primary endpoint of change in MADRS total score to Week 4 (SPN-820: -12.3 ± 0.96 vs. placebo: -11.9 ± 0.96; p = not significant). There was no notable difference between the drug and placebo for secondary endpoints at Week 4. The safety profile of SPN-820 was similar to previous trials, with minimal adverse events reported. This information was released by a biopharmaceutical company specializing in CNS disease treatments listed on Nasdaq as SUPN.

news.headline: Hillenbrand declares $0.225 per share dividend for Q2, payable on March 31, 2025 to shareholders.
news.summary: In Batesville, Indiana, on February 18, 2025, the board of directors of Hillenbrand, Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.225 per share for its common stock (NYSE: HI). The dividend will be distributed on March 31, 2025, to shareholders on record at the end of the payment date.

news.headline: Membrane Labs and BitGo form strategic partnership to enhance BitGo's prime services with advanced digital asset management technology.
news.summary: A recent press release from Membrane Labs and BitGo has revealed an exciting new strategic partnership in New York on February 18, 2025. This collaboration aims to enhance BitGo's prime services offerings by utilizing Membrane's cutting-edge digital asset management technology infrastructure. The partnership is set to drive significant advancements in BitGo's services and further establish them as a leader in the industry. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting development.

news.headline: Mesa Royalty Trust income distribution for Feb 2025 is $0.002429966 per unit. Trust received $31,717 from New Mexico properties.
news.summary: Mesa Royalty Trust declared the Trust income distribution for February 2025, with unitholders of record on February 28 eligible to receive $0.002429966 per unit on April 30. This distribution stems from $31,717 generated solely from Trust's San Juan Basin properties in New Mexico, operated by Hilcorp San Juan LP, an affiliate of Hilcorp Energy Company. No additional income was received in February.

news.headline: Matador Resources Company reports Q4 and full year 2024 results, increases dividend by 25%, and provides 2025 operational update.
news.summary: In Dallas, Matador Resources Company (NYSE: MTDR) disclosed its financial performance for Q4 and FY 2024, along with an update on its 2025 operational strategy. The company also raised its dividend. A presentation outlining the key points of the Q4 and FY 2024 earnings report and the 2025 operational plan can be found on Matador's website at www.matadorresources.com under the Events section.

news.headline: Trump: Ukraine has had a seat, and this could have been settled easily.
Arista Networks Q4: Revenue beats at $1.93B, EPS beats at 65 cents vs. 57 cents expected, strong guidance provided.
news.summary: Arista Networks Inc (NYSE:ANET) released its Q4 financial results, exceeding expectations. The fourth-quarter revenue stood at $1.93 billion, surpassing analysts' $1.9 billion estimate. Adjusted earnings for the quarter were reported at 65 cents per share, higher than the expected 57 cents per share. This marked a 25.3% increase in total revenue compared to the previous year and a 6.6% increase from the prior quarter. The gross margin also showed positive performance. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Star Holdings reported a net loss of $102.6 million in Q4 2024 and $86.8 million for the fiscal year. Earnings per share were ($7.70) and ($6.51) respectively. Market-to-market adjustment on investment caused impact.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Star Holdings (NASDAQ:STHO) declared the submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended on December 31, 2024, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The net income (loss) attributable to common shareholders was reported at ($102.6) million for the fourth quarter and ($86.8) million for the entire year. Earnings (loss) per share stood at ($7.70) for the fourth quarter and ($6.51) for the year. These figures include a non-cash market-to-market adjustment concerning their investment in approximately 13.5 million shares of SAFE, resulting in a ($104.8) million impact on earnings for the quarter and ($66.5) million for the year. Significant financial results have been shared, and further details can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump: We won't have to put any troops in Ukraine.
Shift4 acquires Global Blue, a financial technology leader, with 25 years of industry experience, specializing in retail and hospitality sectors, processing billions of transactions.
news.summary: Signy, Switzerland—Shift4, a prominent figure in the financial technology sector, boasts over 25 years of experience. Specializing in integrated payments, Shift4 caters to retail and hospitality industries. The company has successfully processed billions of transactions both in-person and online. Their cutting-edge technology is revolutionizing payment processes, creating seamless experiences in commerce globally.

Trump: If Europeans want peacekeeping troops in Ukraine, then that's fine.

JBG Smith reports Q4 & full year 2024 results, files 10-K, investor package available online. $JBGS (NYSE) #financials.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, JBG SMITH, a prominent company specializing in high-quality mixed-use properties in the Washington, DC area, has submitted its Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024. As per this filing, their financial performance has been disclosed. For a detailed overview of their operational outcomes, property details, and tenant information, interested parties can access the Fourth Quarter 2024 Investor Package. This comprehensive report is available on the Investor Relations segment of their official website at www.jbgsmith.com. It is encouraged for stakeholders to review this package for further insights.

news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) reports Q4 2024 results, financial details available on website. Conference call set for Feb 19, 2025.
news.summary: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) from Newton, Mass, shared their financial results for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2024. The detailed report is available on SEVN's website under the Quarterly Results section at https://sevnreit.com/investors/financial-information/default.aspx.
